title: Growth Beyond Salvation
refs: Psalm 1 Proverbs 4 Matthew 5 John 15 Romans 8 Galatians 5 Ephesians 5 Joshua 1 John 17 Romans 12 2 Timothy 3 Hebrews 4 1 Peter 2 1 John 1:9 James 2 Psalm 32 Ephesians 2 Titus 2 1 Corinthians 3 2 Corinthians 5 Romans 14 Revelation 22 Romans 8:29 Galatians 4 Philippians 3 Hebrews 6 2 Peter 1 1 John 3
snippet: Six phases from the new birth through Christlikeness — the call to press on, Spirit-filling, the Word as instrument, restoration of righteousness through confession and cleansing, the Bema and rewards, and conformity to Christ.
text: Growth Beyond Salvation. Salvation is the door not the destination. The call to press on. Spirit filling and empowerment. The Word as the instrument of growth. Restoration of righteousness and the works of a living faith. Rewards and the Bema. Conformed to Christ.

title: The Royal Priest
refs: Hebrews 5:5-6 Hebrews 6:17-20 Hebrews 7:1-3 Hebrews 7:24-25 1 Peter 2:5 1 Peter 2:9 Revelation 1:6 Hebrews 7:26-28 Revelation 5:9-10 Romans 5:2 Hebrews 4:14-16 Hebrews 10:19-22 Romans 12:1 Hebrews 13:15-16 Revelation 20:6 2 Timothy 2:12
snippet: The invisible commission — your permanent priestly standing before God, direct access to the throne, the offerings the priest brings, and the eternal priesthood that reigns in the Kingdom.
text: The Royal Priest. What Christ has made you and what to do with it. The priestly order of Melchizedek. Union with Christ confers the royal priesthood. Universal declaration over every Church Age believer. Boldness of access to the throne of grace. Offerings the priest brings living sacrifice praise and doctrine. Eternal priesthood and the Kingdom reign. Priests of God and of Christ reigning with him a thousand years.

title: The Royal Ambassador
refs: Hebrews 1:1-3 John 20:21 2 Corinthians 5:20 Ephesians 6:20 Philemon 9 1 Corinthians 2:16 Philippians 3:20 2 Corinthians 5:18-19 Philippians 4:19 2 Corinthians 9:8 2 Corinthians 12:9 1 Peter 2:9 Romans 12:11 Colossians 3:17 2 Corinthians 5:15 1 Thessalonians 4:16-17 2 Thessalonians 2:6-8 Revelation 19:11-16 Revelation 5:10
snippet: The outward commission — representing the King of kings to a world that rejected Him. Appointed by God, sustained by His supply, operating by His written Word, until the recall at the Rapture closes the embassy.
text: The Royal Ambassador. Christ the original ambassador. The Father sent the Son the Son sends the believer. God appoints not the believer. Ambassador in chains. Written instructions the mind of Christ. Citizenship in heaven. The King supplies everything. Full-time service every believer everywhere. The Rapture as recall of the ambassadors. The Tribulation follows. The Kingdom is the convergence of both commissions.

title: Kingdom Reality
refs: Luke 17:20-21 Colossians 1:13 Romans 14:17 Matthew 13:44 Matthew 13:45-46 Colossians 1:19-20 John 12:31 Ephesians 1:13-14 1 Corinthians 6:19-20 Romans 8:9-11 John 16:11 Ephesians 6:12 1 John 5:19 Daniel 2:44 Revelation 11:15 Luke 19:11-13 Ephesians 1:14 Revelation 5:9-10 Revelation 21:3-5 Isaiah 11:6-9
snippet: The territory purchased by the blood of Christ — already transferred, already inhabited, contested but certain. The Kingdom is not within you, not something you build, and not merely future. It is the present operational reality of every believer.
text: Kingdom Reality. The kingdom is already present. Entós in the midst of you not within you. Transferred into the kingdom at salvation. The purchase price at the cross. Matthew 13 Christ as the buyer not the believer. The field is the cosmos. The pearl is the Church. Spirit within the kingdom around. Arrabón down payment of full inheritance. Operating in contested territory. Convicted enemy taking prisoners. The kingdom is not what you build it is what you inhabit. Kingdom coming in full. Eden restored. All things new.

title: Faith
refs: Ephesians 2:8-9 Romans 12:3 John 6:44 2 Peter 1:1 Romans 10:17 1 Corinthians 15:1-4 John 3:16 Acts 16:31 John 6:37 Romans 10:9-10 Luke 23:42-43 Hebrews 11:1 Hebrews 11:6 Galatians 2:20 2 Corinthians 5:7 Jude 3 Colossians 2:6-7 1 Timothy 4:1 Psalm 119:11 Matthew 8:26 Matthew 17:20 Matthew 9:20-22 Hebrews 12:1-2
snippet: Faith is a gift assigned by God, activated by the Gospel, and expressed in the affirmative response of the will to God's exclusive claim on human destiny — active, passive, and always directed toward Christ as its object.
text: Faith. Faith as gift assigned in measure. The draw of the Father. John 6:44. Gospel as the call. Faith comes by hearing. Positive volition as the saving response. The double negative promise of John 6:37. Active faith the principle that moves. Knowledge belief trust in sequence. Hebrews 11 assurance and conviction. Passive faith the doctrine deposited in the kardia. Jude 3 the faith once delivered. The darkened heart and the measure released. Little faith rebuked versus commended. The mustard seed unobstructed. Hebrews 12 lay aside every weight.

title: The God-Ordered Life
snippet: Man chooses to walk. God plans the steps. An introduction to the curriculum — the three-act shape of a life ordered by God, commanded and arranged toward an eternal assignment.
text: The God-Ordered Life. Introduction. Ordered meaning commanded. Ordered meaning arranged. Man chooses to walk God plans the steps. Metanoia as the operating principle. Three acts of the God-ordered life. First third thinking we are something. Second third knowing we are nothing. Third third God making something out of nothing. The covenant stated not negotiated. Royal priest royal ambassador Kingdom reality. The Holy Spirit is the teacher the Word is the curriculum.

title: Repentance
refs: 2 Corinthians 7:10-11 Romans 12:2 Acts 17:30 Acts 20:21 Luke 15:17-18 Mark 1:15 Ephesians 4:22-24 Philippians 4:8 Colossians 3:2 1 John 1:9 Ephesians 5:18 Hebrews 4:1-3 Romans 5:3-4 Matthew 3:8 Acts 26:20 1 Corinthians 2:16 Romans 8:29 Revelation 20:6 Philippians 2:5
snippet: μετάνοια — a change of mind. Not an emotional performance. Not a works program. The continuous operating principle of the Christian life, applied to sin through confession, to control through the Spirit-filled life, and to every domain where the old framework still operates.
text: Repentance. Metanoia a change of mind. Latin freight of poenitere stripped. Godly sorrow is the catalyst not the repentance. Renewal of the mind Romans 12:2. Repentance at salvation who God is who man is what man needs. Prodigal son came to himself in the pigpen. Repentance as continuous operating principle. Confession 1 John 1:9 agreeing with God about sin. Spirit-filled life Ephesians 5:18 repentance applied to control. Trusting God over circumstances. Fruit of genuine repentance 2 Corinthians 7:11 seven marks. Mind of Christ as the telos of metanoia. Reigning with Christ the destination of the repentant mind.

title: Election
refs: Romans 3:25-26 Isaiah 46:9-10 Genesis 15:6 1 Peter 1:1-2 Matthew 22:9-10 Matthew 22:14 2 Peter 3:9 Exodus 4:21 Exodus 8:15 Romans 9:17-18 Romans 8:28 Romans 9:10-13 Matthew 1:5-6 2 Samuel 12:24 Luke 1:30-31 1 Corinthians 1:27-29 Romans 2:28-29 Romans 9:30-32 John 8:39-40 Galatians 3:28-29 Revelation 5:9 Romans 8:29-30 Revelation 22:17 2 Timothy 2:10
snippet: An invitation from eternity past — extended to all, received by choice. God has a decree. Jesus controls history. The Spirit guides to all truth but does not guide all to truth. Each individual chooses how closely to follow.
text: Election. Invitation from eternity past. Integrity of God. Righteousness demands justice executes grace is always the policy. Just and the justifier simultaneously. Abraham credited faith as righteousness foreknowledge basis. Election as invitation extended to all. Foreknowledge not arbitrary selection. Wedding feast highways and byways. Pharaoh principle negative volition confirmed and leveraged. Romans 9 rightly read. Reversal pattern Jacob Esau Rahab Ruth Nathan Mary. God inverts human expectation. Anti-weaponization principle. Circumcision Torah Abrahamic descent dismantled. Letter subverts spirit. Galatians 3 all one in Christ. Long arc completed. Golden chain Romans 8. Last invitation Revelation 22 Come.

title: Grace and Love — Part 1
refs: Matthew 5:45 Genesis 7:11-12 1 Peter 3:20-21 2 Peter 3:5-6 Ephesians 1:18 2 Corinthians 3:14-16 1 Corinthians 2:14 John 3:16-17 John 3:19-21 Romans 5:8 John 3:3-6 John 3:7-8 John 6:44 John 1:12-13 Romans 8:10 Isaiah 40:2 2 Corinthians 5:17 Ephesians 2:8-9 Romans 11:6 Titus 3:5
snippet: Common grace and the new birth — the rain that falls on all, the veil that thins, the Spirit that steps in. Double imputation at the threshold. John 3, Nicodemus. The plan flows from the integrity of God.
text: Grace and Love Part 1. Common grace impersonal love always to the unbeliever. Grace is God's policy all He is free to do on basis of finished work of Christ. Integrity of God no weak links no human merit. Water as irreplaceable image of grace. First rain judgment and salvation same water. Noah ark common grace mirage becomes real water at positive volition. The veil Ephesians 1:18 eyes of the heart. Human IQ no substitute. Nicodemus night meeting born of water and Spirit. Wind blows where it wills. John 3:16 impersonal love toward hostile world. Double imputation life and righteousness simultaneously. Isaiah 40:2 double for all her sins. New creation.

title: Grace and Love — Part 2
refs: John 4:4-7 Romans 5:10 John 4:10 John 4:13-14 John 7:38-39 Ephesians 1:13-14 John 4:16-18 Romans 8:38-39 Psalm 139:1-4 John 4:23-24 Romans 12:1 1 Peter 2:9 Romans 8:32 2 Peter 1:3 Ephesians 3:16-17 John 4:28-30 John 7:38 John 4:39-42
snippet: Efficacious grace and personal love — always to the believer. The detour through Samaria. The living water that becomes a permanent interior spring. One drink becomes rivers. John 4, the Samaritan woman.
text: Grace and Love Part 2. Efficacious grace personal love always to the believer. Royal family of God adopted redeemed heirs. Grace pipeline inviolable shielded from Satan world flesh. He had to pass through Samaria sovereign appointment ede. Living water permanent interior spring. Never thirst again. Sealed with Spirit arrabón down payment. Go call your husband personal love knows your name. Completely known completely loved. Worship in spirit and truth. Priestly function of the reconciled. Father seeks true worshipers. Grace pipeline from Father through imputed righteousness to indwelling Spirit. Left her water jar one drink becomes rivers. The whole city came out.

title: Confession
refs: Matthew 6:6 Philippians 2:5-8 1 John 1:9 Psalm 32:3-4 Romans 2:1 Proverbs 28:13 Psalm 51:16-17 Luke 9:23 1 Corinthians 1:27-29 Hebrews 4:15-16 1 Corinthians 11:31 Philippians 4:6-7 Psalm 32:5 Genesis 3:9-13 Genesis 3:15 Genesis 3:21 Genesis 3:8 John 1:14 1 John 1:9
snippet: Not a transaction — the approach to the throne. The pipeline is inviolable. Fellowship is the flow. Confession restores it. The known sins forgiven. The forgotten sins cleansed. The first approach was in a garden.
text: Confession. Not transaction not guilt management. Withdrawal of false attribution. Private priesthood. Pipeline inviolable shielded purchased by blood. Sin interrupts the filling confession restores it. Carnal or spiritual mutually exclusive states. Self-serving narrative pride arrogance hatred complex. Broken spirit broken contrite heart. Humbling judging self not others peace of assurance. Known sins forgiven unknown sins cleansed. Approach to the throne prayer praise study proclamation. Not being filled with the Spirit and going on living a Christian life quenches the Spirit. A believer not living a Christian life at all grieves the Spirit. Garden Genesis 3 first approach. Adam vindicated complete record no deflection. Protoevangelion. First blood first covering His choosing. Lord walking in garden incarnation second walking among sinful men. System never changed 1 John 1:9 confirmation not innovation.

title: The Filling of the Holy Spirit
refs: 1 Samuel 16:14 Psalm 51:11 Numbers 11:25 Acts 2:1-4 John 14:16-17 Ephesians 1:13-14 Isaiah 61:1 Luke 4:18 Luke 4:1 Acts 10:38 John 20:22 Ephesians 5:18 1 Corinthians 2:12-14 John 16:13 Ephesians 5:19-20 Colossians 3:16-17 Romans 8:26-27 Galatians 5:22-25 2 Corinthians 3:17-18 1 Corinthians 6:19-20
snippet: The one revocable ministry. Before Pentecost the Spirit was given and withdrawn. After the cross — permanent indwelling inaugurated. Jesus lived the prototype life in the Spirit. He cut the path. Then He gave it to us.
text: Filling of the Holy Spirit. Five ministries indwelling baptism sealing gifts filling. Four irrevocable one revocable. Before Pentecost Spirit given and withdrawn. Saul lost Spirit consulting necromancer. David prayed take not Holy Spirit from me. Prophets received Spirit for commission. Pentecost permanent indwelling inaugurated. Cross completed Son crowned name above every name Spirit poured out. Jesus prototype life Spirit operating environment. Isaiah 61 Luke 4 full of Holy Spirit. Acts 10:38 God anointed Jesus with Holy Spirit and power. He made it lived it first and best cut the path gave it to us. Carnal or spiritual mutually exclusive. Be filled present passive imperative continuously. Not being filled and going on living Christian life quenches Spirit. Believer not living Christian life grieves Spirit. Confession only mechanism restores filling. Pastor-teacher deposits doctrine left lobe Holy Spirit transfers right lobe metabolization. Natural mind stands down at hand-off point. John 16:13 Spirit guides into all truth. Temple sacrifice confession presence filling prayer praise hymns petition thanksgiving. Progressive sanctification begins with knowledge of filling. Glorify Christ in members unique spiritual life Church Age.

title: The Bread of Life
refs: 1 Peter 2:2 Matthew 18:3 Deuteronomy 8:3 Hebrews 5:12-14 1 Corinthians 3:1-3 Ephesians 4:18 John 6:27 James 1:22-25 Romans 7:15 John 6:53-56 John 6:63 John 6:66-67 John 6:68-69 Hebrews 5:14 Colossians 1:9-10 John 17:3 Galatians 4:9 John 6:35
snippet: Doctrine as the food that grows the soul toward maturity. Alienation from the spiritual life is not produced by sin but by ignorance of doctrine. Infancy, adolescence, maturity — all operating under the grace provision of the Holy Spirit.
text: Bread of Life doctrine food soul maturity. Alienation spiritual life ignorance doctrine not sin. Without doctrine believer cannot execute spiritual life. Infancy learning will of God. Child posture teachability. 1 Peter 2:2 pure milk Word. Matthew 18:3 become like children. Deuteronomy 8:3 man does not live by bread alone. Arrested infancy danger soul never fed. Hebrews 5 ought to be teachers still need milk. Corinthians carnal believers flesh not spiritual. Adolescence transition knowing without doing. John 6:27 labor for food that endures. James 1:22 doers not hearers only. Romans 7:15 do not do what I want. Hard saying John 6:53 eat flesh drink blood. Spirit gives life flesh profits nothing words are spirit and life. Many disciples turned back walked away. Maturity executing spiritual life. Peter to whom shall we go words of eternal life. Problem-solving devices operational spiritual gifts deployed. Powers of discernment trained by constant practice. This is eternal life knowing God and being known by God. John 17:3 eternal life knowing the only true God. Galatians 4:9 known by God. John 6:35 bread of life shall not hunger shall never thirst. All stages under grace provision Holy Spirit metabolization.

title: The Integrity of God
refs: Deuteronomy 4:39 Isaiah 46:10 Colossians 1:15-17 Hebrews 13:8 Malachi 3:6 Lamentations 3:22-23 Psalm 139:4 Job 37:16 Romans 11:33 Isaiah 40:26 2 Peter 1:3 Psalm 139:7-10 Hebrews 13:5 John 17:17 John 14:6 John 16:13 Exodus 3:14 John 3:36 Romans 6:23 1 John 4:8 Psalm 89:14 John 3:16 Romans 5:8 1 Chronicles 16:34 Romans 3:21-22 2 Corinthians 5:21 Romans 3:25-26 1 John 1:9 Deuteronomy 32:4
snippet: Ten attributes, one uncompromised character. The incommunicable foundation, the hinge of Veracity and Eternal Life, and the communicable attributes. Justice is the point of contact. Love is the eternal motivation. Righteousness and justice are the guardians of His integrity.
text: Integrity of God ten attributes one uncompromised character. Sovereignty supreme ruler absolute will authority volition free will coexist. Immutability unchangeable no variation shifting shadow faithfulness from immutability. Omniscience all-knowing simultaneously perfect eternal knowledge wisdom. Omnipotence all-powerful unlimited self-restricted by own integrity nothing impossible. Omnipresence entirely present everywhere believer never alone. Veracity absolute truth hinge attribute God knowable Word is truth Spirit of truth guides into all truth. Eternal life self-existing I AM timeless life imputed believers Romans 6:23 gift of God. Love eternal motivation requires no object God is love impersonal personal love. Justice point of contact fallen creature guardians of integrity righteousness principle justice function. Righteousness inviolable standard root center essence imputed at salvation 2 Corinthians 5:21. Justice executes what righteousness demands cross propitiation just and justifier simultaneously. Confession adjustment to justice of God 1 John 1:9 faithful and just. All ten operating simultaneously no compromise cross fullest expression divine integrity.

title: Faith-Rest
refs: 1 Corinthians 3:9-11 Ephesians 2:19-22 Matthew 11:28-30 Hebrews 3:7-11 Exodus 17:2-3 Romans 8:32 Hebrews 4:1-3 Hebrews 4:9-11 Lamentations 3:22-23 John 6:32-35 John 6:63 Matthew 6:11 Deuteronomy 8:3 Hebrews 4:12 Isaiah 40:31 Hebrews 4:14-16 Philippians 4:6-7 1 Peter 1:7-8
snippet: The third problem-solving device. Building a temple not a prison. Cleansed by the blood, fed by the Word, resting in the promises. The three-step drill — claim the promise, apply the rationale, reach the conclusion. The rest remains.
text: Faith-rest third problem-solving device edification complex temple not prison. Faith pistis nonmeritorious compatible grace merit in object. Faith perception gnosis to epignosis Holy Spirit transfers left lobe to right lobe. Meribah wilderness generation warning hit panic button. Hebrews 3 today if you hear his voice harden not your hearts. Forty years daily manna provision available would not trust. Rest remains Hebrews 4 promise not exhausted by failure. Message not mixed with faith did not benefit them. Grain in warehouse seven thousand promises. Manna daily new every morning Lamentations 3:22-23 great is your faithfulness. True bread from heaven John 6 flesh of Christ doctrine metabolized by Spirit. Words are spirit and life. Daily bread Matthew 6:11 Deuteronomy 8:3 every word from mouth of God. Three-step drill claim promise apply doctrinal rationale reach conclusion. Essence of God rationale logistical grace rationale plan of God rationale. Isaiah 40:31 exchange human strength for divine strength. Cleansed by blood confession adjustment to justice of God. Fed by Word filling restored. Resting in promises throne of grace confidence Hebrews 4:16. Peace of God guards heart and mind Philippians 4:7. Temple functional spiritual life as God designed.
